Phase1-EXIT live-PoC dogfood finding #8: default-deny egress floor (modules/networking, sandbox NODE tag) walled the NODE's own kubelet->apiserver registration + AR image pull, so gVisor nodes never reached Ready (serial: dial tcp 172.16.0.2:443 i/o timeout). Pod-level deny is the per-session NetworkPolicy on Dataplane V2, NOT the node tag. Fix (modules/gke): two narrow priority-900 ALLOWs - node->master /28 tcp:443, node->private.googleapis.com VIP 199.36.153.8/30 tcp:443 (+route +VPC private DNS pinning *.googleapis.com/pkg.dev/gcr.io); never 0.0.0.0/0; pod stays proxy-confined (no bypass, verified). Folds in #6 (sandbox idles via sleep overriding run-once entrypoint, fail-closed on absent managed-settings) + #7 (readyTimeout 90s->5min cold gVisor scale-from-zero). 3-lens pre-pr-review: correctness caught P1 (restricted.googleapis.com .4/30 does NOT serve pkg.dev/gcr.io -> switched to private. .8/30); security boundary intact; spec aligned. NOT YET APPLIED LIVE (apply was out of diagnose-scope/classifier-blocked) - operator applies via CD + re-runs PoC + destroys. tf validate + go gates green. Follow-up: arch views 05/06.

notes: Push->PR bridge PR-E1 of 4 (discovered: orchestrator->real-GitHub-PR is an unbuilt Tier-2 residual; propose() commits in-sandbox but never pushes -> OpenPullRequest 422). Design = control-plane-mediated push, sandbox stays SCM-free (no SCM egress/push cred; lethal-trifecta unchanged) per the interface docstrings' 'control-plane-side push' intent. E1 = the content-in/commit-out rung. cloud.go field-only (backward-compat): EngineTask.RepoBundle (base content as git bundle, seeded into sandbox via kubectl exec stdin BEFORE engine) + EngineResult.CommitBundle (working-branch bundle the control plane later pushes; content-bearing -> push path is DLP point). cloud-gcp: seedWorkspace writes bundle in; workspaceSeedScript fetches base from LOCAL FILE never origin, requires EXACTLY ONE base head (fail closed 0/many), checkout -B off it, rm; Run extracts via 'git bundle create - <branch>' over new stdout-only runOut/execInOut (binary-safe, no stderr corruption); .console7-base.bundle excluded. devkit MemCloud + cloud-gcp fake return stand-in CommitBundle; sdk/testkit conformance asserts Changed=>non-empty / no-change=>empty (monorepo rule). New unit tests: bundle seed script + runOut (NUL-safe/stderr-on-error/stdin). Deferred (docstring-noted): max-bundle size cap both legs (first-party bytes, resource bound). GUARD GOTCHA: guard-bash blocks ' bundle' (space+bun matches the bunx? token) -> hyphenate 'git-bundle' in titles/commands or append via temp file. Gates: build both tags/vet/test/golangci-0 both tags/coverage green. NEXT=E2 (SCMProvider FetchRepoBundle+PushBranch) -> E3 orchestrator wiring -> E4 GitHub App+live run. Target repo console7/exit-poc created.

TOKEN handling: installation token via git credential helper reading $C7_GIT_TOKEN from CHILD ENV - never argv/URL/disk; ambient helpers cleared (no host keychain); GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0 fail-closed.
